/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/MyExecutable.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyExecutable.dir/src/test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyExecutable.dir/src/operatehttp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyExecutable.dir/src/operatelog.cpp.o -o MyExecutable  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lSQLite3::SQLite3 /usr/local/lib/libSQLiteCpp.a /usr/local/lib/libsqlite3.a -ldl
